rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §29.454, which governs behavior support specialists for alleged offender residents in school districts. No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.454. BEHAVIOR MANAGEMENT; BEHAVIOR SUPPORT SPECIALISTS.
_note: Rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed property tax exemption change; no conflict detected.
